modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: POIIDEN form in Banner is not functioning on Windows.

full_description_text: User attempted to access the POIIDEN form in Banner. The form did not load as expected. This issue occurred while using Internet Explorer on a Windows environment.
short_description: POIIDEN form in Banner is not functioning on Windows.
description: User attempted to access the POIIDEN form in Banner. The form did not load as expected. This issue occurred while using Internet Explorer on a Windows environment.
